name: local-remote
description: Local daemon: subscribe to remote Redis SYSTEM:* events, optional MIDI triggers

scripts.build: cargo build --manifest-path daemon/Cargo.toml --release --target-dir daemon/target && mkdir -p dist && cp daemon/target/release/local-remote dist/local-remote
scripts.clean: cargo clean --manifest-path daemon/Cargo.toml --target-dir daemon/target && rm -rf dist
